info.title: RIS-Maps API
info.description:
Central API integration layer for RIS-Maps related data provided by backend services like geoserver or vista.
Due to json response protocol usage, parsers must be able to ignore not yet defined objects and attributes which can be added without minor version increment and consider that the order of these elements is not guaranteed.
Most endpoints should be used without query parameters but path parameters for better browser caching support.
The corresponding query parameter endpoints (../by..) are deprecated since 0.22.0 or prior.
The endpoints providing maps as png images should be used with the 512/512 pixel requests/responses starting with '2' like 2/map/.., map/..(256/256 pixel) are deprecated since 0.22.0 or prior

tags.name: Timekey
tags.description: Information about timebased key for users of RIS Maps API

tags.name: Routing
tags.description: indoor routing with real lengths over multiple levels

tags.name: Metro
tags.description: Metro network of station and line shapes of several traffic associations operating in german cities.

tags.name: PoiIndoor
tags.description: indoor points of interest regarding stations

tags.name: Map
tags.description: foreground and background maps, station maps etc. Endpoints with 2 provides 512*512 pixel images for higher performance, the other endpoints are depreceated

ZoneProviderEnum.description: Geoserver provider classification for zone: Request a zone provided by the RI-MAPS Team = DB or DB and OSM as fallback.

TrackbedProviderEnum.description: Geoserver provider classification for trackbed: Request a trackbed provided by the RI-MAPS Team = DB or DB and OSM as fallback.

RailwayProviderEnum.description: Geoserver provider classification for railway: Request a railway provided by the RI-MAPS Team = DB or DB and OSM as fallback.

PoiProviderEnum.description: Geoserver provider classification for poi: Request a poi provided by the RI-MAPS Team = DB or OSM or DB and OSM as fallback.

StationProviderEnum.description: Geoserver provider classification for station: Request a station provided by the RI-MAPS Team = DB or DB and OSM as fallback.

LevelProviderEnum.description: Geoserver provider classification for level: Request a level provided by the RI-MAPS Team = DB or DB and OSM as fallback.

BuildingProviderEnum.description: Geoserver provider classification for building: Request a building provided by the RI-MAPS Team = DB or DB and OSM as fallback.

key.description: DB timebased key, valid for one hour

topRight.description: Bounding coordinates for top right corner.

bottomLeft.description: Bounding coordinates for bottom left corner.

tileids15.description: Tileids from zoom 15 to zoom 19 zone.

zones.description: List of zones that match provided criterias.

viewPort.description: View Port Bounding box for zone list.

tileids15.description: Tileids from zoom 15 to zoom 19 zone.

trackbeds.description: List of trackbeds that match provided criterias.

viewPort.description: View Port Bounding box for trackbed list.

RrtGeometryTypeEnum.description: Possible Points Of Interest Types of rail replacement transport

id.description: Id of rail replacement transport point.

text.description: Description of rail replacement transport point.

evaNumber.description: Number of related Station in EVA Application.

rl100.description: Number of related Station in RIL100 Application.

zoneID.description: Assigned Zone-ID of rail replacement transport point.

walkDescription.description: Walk description to rail replacement transport point. - ONLY if RrtPointTypeEnum == SEV -

walkDescriptionForeignLanguage.description: Walk description to rail replacement transport point in a foreign language

walkDescriptionForeignLanguageCode.description: Walk descriptionn code of foreign language

hasBike.description: Flag of providing bicycle parking site

buildings.description: List of buildings that match provided criterias.

viewPort.description: View Port Bounding box for building list.

disruptionStatus.description:
Status of disruption or construction.
- ARCHIVED ()
- CLOSED ()
- DRAFT ()
- ONLINE ()
- OPEN ()
- PLANNED ()

announcementStatus.description:
Status of announcement.
- CLOSED ()
- DRAFT ()
- RELEASED ()
- ONLINE ()
- PLANNED ()
- ARCHIVED ()

MetroDADurationTypeEnum.description:
Type of disruption announcement:
- UNKNOWN ()
- TBD (ToBeDetermined - null)
- TEOS (TillEndOfService - string - absolute time in UTC)
- ABS (Absolute - string – absolute time in UTC)
- REL (Relative - number - relative duration in seconds)
- TDAT (TillDateAndTime – string - absolute time in UTC)

MetroDAStatusEnum.description:
Status of announcement.
- CLOSED ()
- DRAFT ()
- RELEASED ()
- ONLINE ()
- PLANNED ()
- ARCHIVED ()

MetroDMStyleEnum.description:
Type of disruption mask.
- DARK (the dark style of a mask)
- LIGHT (the light style of a mask)

MetroDMTypeEnum.description:
Type of disruption mask.
- TIMESTAMP (Mask containing the timestamp of rendering the image)
- TEXT (Mask with textual information)
- DISRUPTION_MAP (Mask explaining the disruption)
- JOURNEY_MAP (Mask showing how the journey is disrupted)
- LINE_OVERVIEW (Mask with an overview of the effected lines)
- ALTERNATIVE_MAP (Mask showing how the journeys alternative is)
- OVERVIEW_MAP (Mask with an overview of the map)
- OVERVIEW_MAP_V2 (Mask with an overview of the map, version 2 uses style attribute)
- OVERVIEW_MAP_BLANK (Mask with an overview as a blank map)
- OVERVIEW_MAP_LARGE (Mask with an overview as a large map)
- OVERVIEW_MAP_LARGE_WITH_LINE_OVERVIEW (Mask with an overview as a large map with lines)
- CONSTRUCTION_MAP_BY_LINE (Mask with an overview of constructions on a map for a line)
- CONSTRUCTION_TEXT_BY_LINE (Mask with an overview of constructions as text for a line)

id.description: Unique id of the major disruption

createdAt.description: Date of creating the major disruption

updatedAt.description: Date of updating the major disruption

closedAt.description: Date of closing the major disruption

lines.description: Affected lines of the major disruption

metroDisruptionLineSegmentIds.description: Affected segments ids of map segments

relatedDisruptionConceptId.description: Id of related disruption concept in use

closedAt.description: Date of closing the disruption concept

lineName.description: Affected line alternative/variant of this mask, 'all' for any line

line.description: Affected line of this mask, 'all' for any line

language.description: Language code in use for texts of the mask

prominentStationId.description: Station id, only if a prominent station

imageId.description: Image id of the masks, arbitrary for each request

mapResolution.description: Resolution of the underlaying map of the mask

duration.description: Default duration of displaying the mask

metroDisruptions.description: List of disruptions or active one
